steps.title: Spot the plural signal in the relative clause
steps.content: The phrase “who made New York City their home” uses plural pronouns (“who” and “their”), indicating a plural antecedent noun.

steps.title: Apply the plural and non-possessive requirements
steps.content:
“Stories of the South Asian immigrants” is correct: plural noun matching the relative clause, non-possessive form working with “of.” The other choices use singular nouns or possessive forms, violating these requirements.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
